config.script:
function fire_default_explorer(byref pRootObject) dim nParamTypeId dim nParamIdObj dim nExplorerKind if not get_explorer_param(pRootObject,nParamTypeId,nParamIdObj,nExplorerKind) then exit function end if doc_.postcommand trans_.afc.convert.formatter("varCmd=CMD_OPEN_STATIC_PAGE varDestPage=PAGE_EXPLORER_LAUNCHER varNewThread=1 " +_ "appvar_raport_type=%1 appvarParamTypeid=%2 appvarParamIdobj=%3") _ (nExplorerKind)(nParamTypeId)(nParamIdObj).done() end function
function get_explorer_param(byref pRootObject,byref nParamTypeId,byref nParamIdObj,byref nExplorerKind) get_explorer_param = false select case pRootObject.type case TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS if pRootObject.pZamowienie is nothing then nParamTypeId=FIXED_FAKTURA_ROOT if pRootObject.pPopSprzed is nothing then if pRootObject.pFaktura is nothing then #ifdef ENABLE_DB12 if pRootObject.sprzed_pDostawa is nothing then nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj else nParamIdObj=pRootObject.sprzed_pDostawa.idobj end if #else nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj #endif else nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pFaktura.idobj end if else nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pPopSprzed.idobj end if else nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZAMOWIENIE_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pZamowienie.idobj end if get_explorer_param = true case TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZAMOWIENIE_ROOT if pRootObject.pZamowienie is nothing then #ifdef APPCONFIG_DOSTAWA_WEGLA if pRootObject.curExtra4 > ccur(0.0) then nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=clng(pRootObject.curExtra4) get_explorer_param = true else nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj end if #else nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj #endif else nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pZamowienie.idobj end if get_explorer_param = true case TYPEID_N5DOKMAG select case pRootObject.pRejestrDok.eTyp
case N5REJESTRDOK__PW #ifdef _IOW if not pRootObject.pDokMag is nothing then nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pDokMag.idobj get_explorer_param = true else nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl is nothing then nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj get_explorer_param = true else if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.type = TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD then nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZLECPROD_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.idObj get_explorer_param = true end if end if end if #else nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pDokMag.idobj get_explorer_param = true #endif
case N5REJESTRDOK__RW nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS #ifdef _KES if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl is nothing then nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj get_explorer_param = true else if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.type = TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE then nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZAMOWIENIE_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.idObj get_explorer_param = true end if end if #else nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj get_explorer_param = true #endif
case N5REJESTRDOK__ZZ,N5REJESTRDOK__ZD,N5REJESTRDOK_ZAK_REZERWACJI nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pDokMag.idobj get_explorer_param = true
case N5REJESTRDOK__WZ,N5REJESTRDOK__PZ nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl is nothing then nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj get_explorer_param = true else if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.type = TYPEID_N5SPRZEDAZ then nParamTypeId=FIXED_FAKTURA_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.idObj get_explorer_param = true
elseif pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.type = TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE then nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZAMOWIENIE_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.idObj get_explorer_param = true
elseif pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.type = TYPEID_N5ZAKUP then nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZAKUP_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.idObj get_explorer_param = true
end if end if case N5REJESTRDOK__RP,N5REJESTRDOK__PP nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl is nothing then nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj get_explorer_param = true else if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.type = TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD then nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZLECPROD_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.idObj get_explorer_param = true end if end if
case N5REJESTRDOK_REZERWACJE nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl is nothing then nParamTypeId=FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj get_explorer_param = true else if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.type = TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE then nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZAMOWIENIE_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.idObj get_explorer_param = true end if end if
case N5REJESTRDOK__MM nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl is nothing then nParamTypeId = FIXED_DOKMAG_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.idobj get_explorer_param = true else if pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.type = TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE then nParamTypeId = FIXED_ZAMOWIENIE_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.wrefDokHandl.idObj get_explorer_param = true end if end if
end select case TYPEID_N5REALPROD nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS if pRootObject.pZlecProd is nothing then nParamTypeId=FIXED_REALPROD_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.idObj get_explorer_param = true else nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZLECPROD_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.pZlecProd.idObj get_explorer_param = true end if case TYPEID_N5ZLECPROD nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS if pRootObject.pNadZlec is nothing then if pRootObject.pZamowienie is nothing then nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZLECPROD_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.idObj get_explorer_param = true else nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZAMOWIENIE_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pZamowienie.idobj get_explorer_param = true end if else nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZLECPROD_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.pNadZlec.idObj get_explorer_param = true end if case TYPEID_N5ZAKUP nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_SALES_AND_MAN_PROCESS if pRootObject.pZamowienie is nothing then nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZAKUP_ROOT if pRootObject.pPopZakup is nothing then nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj else nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pPopZakup.idobj end if else nParamTypeId=FIXED_ZAMOWIENIE_ROOT nParamIdObj=pRootObject.pZamowienie.idobj end if get_explorer_param = true case TYPEID_N5ZADANIE nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_TASKS_BY_TYPE nParamTypeId = FIXED_ZADANIA nParamIdObj=pRootObject.idobj get_explorer_param = true case TYPEID_N5PROJEKT_ABAS nExplorerKind = EXPLORER_PROJEKT_BY_PROTOKOL nParamTypeId = FIXED_N5PROJEKT_ABAS_ROOT nParamIdObj = pRootObject.idobj get_explorer_param = true end select end function
